name: Logic Compare
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class LogicCompareNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Logic Compare"
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/scales.svg"
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("a", "any")
        self.add_input("b", "any")
        self.add_output("greater", "boolean")
        self.add_output("equal", "boolean")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        a = inputs.get("a")
        b = inputs.get("b")
        
        greater = False
        equal = False
        
        try:
            greater = a > b
            equal = a == b
        except:
            pass
            
        await self.set_output("exec_out", True)
        return {
            "greater": greater,
            "equal": equal
        }

def register_node():
    return LogicCompareNode
